---
title: Articles
toc: true
---

# ti Articles

In-depth guides and tutorials for using the package.

- [ABC Classification](vignettes/articles/abc.qmd)
- [Standard vs. Non-Standard Calendars](vignettes/articles/calendar_types.qmd)
- [Cohort](vignettes/articles/cohort.qmd)
- [Getting started](vignettes/articles/ti.qmd)
